A.evidence: Good prose coverage through section 4 and Table 1, but all displayed equations are replaced by formula-not-decoded and Figure 1/2 diagram text is jumbled into the reading flow.

B.evidence: Strong prose, equations, and Table 1; minor damage includes noisy citation links, malformed footnote HTML, and garbled parameter-matrix superscripts after MultiHead.

C.evidence: Very faithful prose, equations, and Table 1; misses the visible Google permission notice and mostly omits figure/diagram content, with plain rather than consistent heading markup.

D.evidence: Captures most prose and Table 1, but has OCR/math damage such as h_t_-_1 and spaced-out LaTeX, a typo in sequence-aligned, and hallucinated Flow chart text near Figure 2.
